Central Housing Cooperative Union (CHCU)
description: CHCU is a non-governmental oganisation whose members are the cooperative housing societies in Egypt. Their aims are to provide adequate modern housing for middle to low-income citizens at real cost while providing necessary services that would benefit members. All housing cooperatives are under the supervision, assistance and direction of CACU by Egyptian law. The General Assembly is made up of the cooperative housing societies and they elect the Board of Directors.

name: The General Authority for Construction and Housing Cooperatives (CHC)
description: The General Authority for Construction & Housing Cooperatives (CHC) is one of the government bodies affiliated to the Ministry of Housing, Utilities and Urban Communities in Egypt. CHC is working to advance the process of cooperative housing in Egypt through dissemination of cooperative goals and objectives within the recent context. It aims to provide decent housing for every Egyptian citizen at an affordable price with easy instalments. It also helps develop various cooperative (productive) communities. They have recently allocated land in 15 cities in Egypt for the construction of cooperative housing communities. They also provide consultation and support in planning, urban design, architectural design and by providing infrastructure / public utilities. They can also provide site management and supervision during the construction phase. These activities are completed with affiliated cooperative societies.
